notes: Manual demo payloads for POST /api/characters after logging in as a campaign owner/GM/player. These do not auto-seed production data.

characters.name: Vaelor Dusk-Revenant
characters.publicSummary: A black-armored battlefield occultist with a crimson two-handed blade, commanding presence, fear pressure, and force-like psychic flavor. Built to test martial, social, aura, heavy armor, and implement presentation.
characters.privateNotes: Inspired by a dark fallen-knight fantasy archetype; not a direct licensed character name for public demo use.
characters.buildNotes: Thaumaturge 6, Regalia implement, heavy armor theme, bastard sword/crossguard weapon, charisma-forward intimidation and party aura support.
characters.gmNotes: Use to test GM-visible notes, private fields, party-safe character summary, and dark armored portrait presentation later.
characters.inventoryText: Full plate, bastard sword, regalia implement, adventurer's pack, healer's tools, lesser healing potions.

characters.name: Kara Ironvale
characters.publicSummary: Frontline shield defender for testing tank-style character cards, high AC/HP, saves, and party-visible support notes.
characters.buildNotes: Simple durable martial baseline for comparing character presentation against more complex builds.
characters.inventoryText: Steel shield, full plate, warhammer, religious symbol, repair kit.

characters.name: Seren Ashquill
characters.publicSummary: Arcane researcher and control caster for testing spellcaster identity, low HP, high intelligence, and lore-linked character notes.
characters.buildNotes: Prepared arcane caster test profile. Use later to validate spell presentation blocks.
characters.inventoryText: Spellbook, staff, explorer's clothing, scroll case, ink and quills.

characters.name: Mira Dawnhand
characters.publicSummary: Party healer and support caster for testing support-role presentation, public utility notes, and GM-shared but player-owned data.
characters.buildNotes: Healing font support profile with high Wisdom/Charisma. Use to test support cards and future spell blocks.
characters.inventoryText: Healer's tools, religious symbol, mace, chain shirt, scrolls, healing kit.
